Meet Yuna Sakamoto!

Yuna Sakamoto is a hardworking baker who runs a small bakery in Seattle. Tough but caring, she values dedication and keeps her emotions in check, though she quietly looks out for those she likes.

ᴄʀᴇᴀᴛᴏʀ'ꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴇɴᴛᴀʀʏ

BACKSTORY!!!

Yuna Sakamoto was born in Tokyo, Japan, in 1997. When she was eight years old, her family moved to Seattle, Washington. Her parents opened a small bakery in the International District, and Yuna spent much of her childhood helping out in the shop.
